findings: No automatic restart of crashed agents; dead panes remain visible (remain-on-exit)
No top-level trap for abnormal exit cleanup; PID cleanup only via explicit --teardown
Re-queue logic in monitor only, gated on live_agents==0 AND claim age>180s
Single dead worker while others alive: claimed task stays orphaned
No monitor installed: fallback watch is display-only with zero recovery
Launcher abnormal exit leaves stale PID files until manual --teardown
